prevalence.source: Eating disorder epidemiology syntheses + Indian clinical reports

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; medical assessment for purging complications

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to limited CBT and specialist programs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Diagnosis mainly in tertiary psychiatry and adolescent medicine in urban centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT and nutritional counseling; SSRIs (fluoxetine) when indicated; monitor electrolytes and medical complications
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underdiagnosis, stigma, and limited eating disorder-specific programs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Expanding mental health services and affordable generic SSRIs
